nodes.name: ⏰ Check Approvals Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Polls Google Sheets every 6 hours to check if you've approved any products. Change interval as needed.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Approved Products from Sheets
nodes.notes: Reads rows where APPROVED=YES and Status='Research Complete'. These are products you approved for creation.

nodes.name: 🔀 Any Approved Products?
nodes.notes: IF there are approved products → continue to creation. IF not → stop workflow silently.

parameters.jsCode:
// No approved products found - exit gracefully
return [{ json: { status: 'NO_ACTION', message: 'No approved products found this cycle. Waiting for your approval in Google Sheets.' } }];

nodes.name: 💤 No Action Needed
nodes.notes: Graceful exit when no products are approved yet.

values.content: You are an expert digital product creator and copywriter. You create complete, ready-to-sell digital product packages including compelling titles, SEO-optimized descriptions, tags, pricing strategy, and detailed creation guides. You specialize in Etsy, Gumroad, and Payhip listings. Always respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 Ollama Creator Agent (llama3)
nodes.notes: llama3 generates the complete product package: listing copy, creation guide, AI prompts, and ALL social media content in one call.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse Product Package
nodes.notes: Safely parses the product package from Ollama. Adds publish status flags.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Prep Image Prompt Request
nodes.notes: Prepares request for phi3 to generate image prompts for Leonardo.ai or Stable Diffusion.

values.content: You are an expert at writing image generation prompts for digital product mockups. You write prompts for Leonardo.ai, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion. Always respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 phi3 — Generate Image Prompts
nodes.notes: phi3 generates precise image prompts. Use these prompts in Leonardo.ai free tier or Stable Diffusion to create product visuals.

nodes.name: 🔀 Build Complete Product Record
nodes.notes: Merges product listing + image prompts into one complete record for publishing.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to Products_Ready Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes the complete product record to the Products_Ready tab. This feeds into Workflow 3 (Publishing).

nodes.name: 📊 Update Research Sheet Status
nodes.notes: Updates the original research row status to 'Creation Complete' so you don't process it again.

meta.description: Phase 2: Approval gate + product creation. Reads approved products from Sheets, uses llama3 to create full product packages and phi3 for image prompts. Writes everything to Products_Ready tab.
